content:
# Session 28 (iter-028) — review

## Metadata
- File: `AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/SectionGradedRing.lean` (mathlib-build mode).
- Comm-chain sorry: **3 → 1**. Global SNAP sorry **7 → 5** (4 χ in QuotScheme untouched).
- Targets: `tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible` (PRIMARY, gated deliverable),
  `tensorPowAdd_comm`, `sectionsMul_mul_comm`.
- 7 new decls (6 axiom-clean + 1 reduced). `IsInvertible` re-signed (iter-027 plan) to carry a
  trivializing-basis as data — verified faithful to `def:isInvertible`.

## tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible — SOLVED, axiom-clean ✅
The iter-028 gated novel-infrastructure deliverable (`lem:braiding_eq_id_of_invertible`, Stacks 01CR).
First-hand `lean_verify` = `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`. Route A (basis-local
sheafification descent), built bottom-up via 4 private helpers:
- `moduleCat_braiding_hom_eq_comm`: `(β_ M M).hom = ofHom (TensorProduct.comm).toLinearMap` —
  `ModuleCat.hom_ext; TensorProduct.ext'; rfl`. No invertibility needed.
- `moduleCat_braiding_self_hom_eq_id`: on invertible `M`, `(β_ M M).hom = 𝟙` via
  `Module.Invertible.tensorProductComm_eq_refl`. **KEY: invertibility passed as EXPLICIT arg `hM`** so
  the `Γ(X,U)` (`X.presheaf.obj`) vs `R.obj U` (`X.sheaf.obj ⋙ forget₂`) ring-spelling diamond is
  dissolved by **defeq**, not instance search (earlier `haveI` attempts hit
  `failed to synthesize CommSemiring/Module`).
- `braiding_self_app_eq_id_of_invertible`: presheaf component at trivializing open `U` is `𝟙` —
  `erw [PresheafOfModules.braiding_hom_app]` (plain `rw` no-match) → ModuleCat helper.
- `braiding_comp_unit_eq_unit_of_isInvertible`: descent `β^pre ≫ η = η` via
  `(toPresheaf _).map_injective` → `TopCat.Sheaf.hom_ext _ _ hbasis` (the underlying Ab sheaf — NOT
  `Scheme.Modules.hom_ext`, the ⊤-trap) → per-basis-open component `= 𝟙` (`erw [toPresheaf_map_app_apply]`).
- Main: `Iso.ext` → `change sheafification.map β = 𝟙` → `homEquiv.injective` →
  `rw [homEquiv_unit, homEquiv_unit]; erw [Functor.map_id, Category.comp_id]` (plain `rw`/`simp` FAIL on
  the `𝟙`) → `(unit.naturality β).symm.trans (descent eqn)`.

## tensorPowAdd_comm — PARTIAL (base proved, succ = THE blocker)
- **Base `m'=0` PROVED:** `rw [tensorPowAdd_zero_right, tensorObjRightUnitor_eq_braiding_unit,
  tensorPowAdd_zero_left]; Iso.ext; simp only [Iso.trans_hom, eqToIso.hom]; congr 1; simp`. New helper
  `tensorObjRightUnitor_eq_braiding_unit` descends `MonoidalCategory.braiding_leftUnitor`
  (`β_{G,𝟙} ≫ λ = ρ`) through sheafification.
- **Succ `c+1` = single honest `sorry` (L3682).** Verified-in-session obstruction (`rw [tensorPowAdd_succ,
  ih]`): residual goal
  `α⁻¹ ≪≫ WR(β_{L^m,L^c} ≪≫ μ_{c,m} ≪≫ reindex) L = β_{L^m,L^{c+1}} ≪≫ μ_{c+1,m} ≪≫ reindex`.
  RHS `μ_{c+1,m} = tensorPowAdd L (c+1) m` is a **1st-index** successor; `tensorPowAdd` recurses on the
  **2nd** index ⇒ neither `tensorPowAdd_succ` nor `ih` (gives `μ_{c,m}`) reaches it. `lean_verify`
  confirms `sorryAx`.

## sectionsMul_mul_comm — RESOLVED modulo tensorPowAdd_comm
Own explicit `sorry` REMOVED; fully reduced to `tensorPowAdd_comm` (element-level B7 pattern):
`simp only [gMul_mul_apply]; rw [← tensorBraiding_hom_sectionsMul …, tensorPowAdd_comm L na nb,
iso_trans_hom_val_app_apply, iso_trans_hom_val_app_apply, ← sectionsCast_apply, sectionsCast_sectionsCast];
exact Nat.add_comm nb na`. New helper `iso_trans_hom_val_app_apply`. `lean_verify` = `sorryAx` only
transitively via `tensorPowAdd_comm`. Auto axiom-clean once the succ-hexagon closes. (Note: comment body
correctly documents the statement is FALSE for general `L`.)

## sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring — correctly NOT added
By the no-sorry invariant for NEW decls (would carry transitive `sorryAx` via `sectionsMul_mul_comm`).
Assemble the iter AFTER the succ-hexagon closes (mechanical: `DirectSum.GCommSemiring` extending the
done `gsemiring` with graded `mul_comm` = `sectionsMul_mul_comm` via `gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast`).

## Verification (both highly-recommended dispatched — prover touched the file)
- **lean-auditor** `iter028` — **CLEAN, 0 critical / 0 major / 2 minor.** All proofs genuine; `erw`/`change`/
  `Iso.ext` legitimate (documented transparency boundaries, no false goals); single `sorry` honest +
  un-weakened; no `maxHeartbeats 1e6` (the two `800000` are pre-existing + commented); no axioms/
  protected-sig edits/excuse-comments. Minors: bare `simp` L3652 (style), slight over-statement in MY
  directive's `IsInvertible` description (code correct). Report: `task_results/lean-auditor-iter028.md`.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** `iter028` — **PASS, 0 must-fix, 2 major (chapter-side), 1 minor.** All 4
  scope decls faithful + un-weakened (`[IsInvertible L]` retained); `tensorBraiding_self…` PROVED axiom-
  clean with correct dual `\leanok`; `tensorPowAdd_comm`/`sectionsMul_mul_comm` correctly carry NO proof-
  `\leanok`; `IsInvertible` re-sign matches `def:isInvertible`. Report:
  `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-iter028.md`. The 2 majors are BLUEPRINT debts (see below).

## Blueprint debts surfaced by lvbc (→ recommendations)
1. **(major, plan-agent/blueprint-writer)** Transport-narrative over-claim:
   `def:sheafModule_monoidalStructure` (L660) + `cor:sheafModule_braided_symmetric` (L682–683) say
   commutativity is "inherited rather than hand-proved" — read literally that holds for ANY `L`,
   contradicting the genuinely-necessary `[IsInvertible L]`. The dedicated `lem:tensorPowAdd_comm` block
   is itself CORRECT (routes through `β_{L,L}=id`). Reconcile the transport prose.
2. **(major, FIXED by me)** Stale `% NOTE (iter-018)` on `lem:tensorProductComm_eq_refl_mathlib`
   (L1157–1161): the three claims (PicardGroup unimported / referenced only in comments / lemma
   deferred-sorried) are all now FALSE. Refreshed to an iter-028 RESOLVED note. `\mathlibok` correct.

## sync_leanok — 4th consecutive CLEAN
iter-028 (sha e2345f0): +6 / −0, no corruption. The 11-iter over-strip/corruption streak (013→023)
stays ended.

## Blueprint doctor
All findings are the KNOWN out-of-cone merge-back EXTRACTION artifacts: `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex`
(2 nonexistent `% covers` files + ~14 broken `\ref`), `Picard_GlueDescent.tex` (4 broken `\cref`/`\uses`),
`Picard_QuotScheme.tex` (~13 broken `\cref`). Outside the 3-seed cone; resolve at merge (unchanged since
iter-011). No new in-cone breakage.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, `lem:tensorProductComm_eq_refl_mathlib`: refreshed stale
  `% NOTE (iter-018)` → accurate `% NOTE (iter-028) RESOLVED` (all three iter-018 claims now false).

## 1-to-1 coverage debt (→ recommendations)
6 new `private` helpers are unmatched `lean_aux` (no blueprint entry): `moduleCat_braiding_hom_eq_comm`,
`moduleCat_braiding_self_hom_eq_id`, `braiding_self_app_eq_id_of_invertible`,
`braiding_comp_unit_eq_unit_of_isInvertible`, `iso_trans_hom_val_app_apply`,
`tensorObjRightUnitor_eq_braiding_unit`. Plan agent should blueprint them (fold descent plumbing under
`lem:braiding_eq_id_of_invertible`; `tensorObjRightUnitor_eq_braiding_unit` is a real coherence lemma →
sub-block under `lem:tensorPowAdd_comm` base).
